title: datura waymanii
intro: Datura waymanii, also known as the Devil's Trumpet or Poison Devil, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, native to the island of Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Datura waymanii include relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as pain relief and sedation. Datura waymanii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it due to its potential toxicity.
